decisions.title_en: Anthropic resists $800B investor offers, more than 2x Feb round
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Prior Apr 13 item anthropic-revenue-surpasses-openai covered the $30B ARR milestone; this is a distinct story about investors offering 2x+ the February valuation, which Anthropic is turning down — new facts (offer level, IPO-bank talks with Goldman/JPM/MS for Oct 2026) not covered before.

decisions.title_en: Jane Street commits $6B to CoreWeave + $1B equity buy
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Distinct from prior coreweave-anthropic-cloud-deal (Apr 10) — this is a new customer (Jane Street quant trading), first non-AI-lab/non-Meta customer at this scale, plus $1B direct equity purchase at $109/share.

decisions.title_en: Meta + Broadcom unveil 4 generations of MTIA chips, 1GW to multi-GW
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Prior meta-quest-vr-ram-price-hike (Apr 16) covered consumer price hike; this is a separate silicon-strategy story — extended Broadcom partnership to 2029, roadmap to MTIA 500, hundreds of thousands of chips already deployed.

decisions.title_en: Physical Intelligence releases pi0.7 robot brain with compositional generalization
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. New robotics foundation model claiming 'mix-and-match' skill composition for tasks never seen in training — distinct from prior NVIDIA Cosmos / GR00T items.

decisions.title_en: Adobe launches Firefly AI Assistant for cross-app Creative Cloud workflows
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Major creative-suite agentic AI launch, single prompt drives Photoshop/Premiere/Illustrator/Lightroom; ships with Anthropic Claude integration — distinct from previously covered AI coding agents.

story_key in lookback on Apr 2 covering original MAI-Voice-1/Transcribe-1/Image-2 launch. Today's item is a substantively NEW variant: 41% price cut, 22% speed boost, 4x per-GPU throughput, and new benchmark claim of beating Gemini 3 Pro Image by 40% on latency. Treat as new development, prior recap required.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic moves to per-token billing, Amodei warns of AI demand 'cone of uncertainty'
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Distinct from revenue story — this is a pricing-model and CEO-stance piece. Amodei's 'cone of uncertainty' framing and Anthropic's switch from flat-rate enterprise pricing to per-token (vs OpenAI's larger headline numbers) is a strategic bet worth covering.

decisions.title_en: Mike Krieger steps down from Figma board ahead of Claude Design launch
decisions.reason: story_key already published on 2026-04-17 with title 'Anthropic 推出 Claude Design 挑战 Figma'. The board departure is the lead-up disclosure to that same launch — no substantively new information beyond what prior item already covered (Figma stock drop, Claude Design app launch, Krieger's role).

decisions.title_en: OpenAI Spud model still not released, Polymarket 78% by Apr 30
decisions.reason: story_key already published on 2026-04-13. No new development — model still not released, Polymarket odds unchanged. Merely rehashes prior facts.
